feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Free-form text feedback on the task run.

source.title: FeedbackSource
source.description:
Where a piece of feedback originated.

This is an append-only enum: new sources can be added freely, but existing
values must never be removed or renamed so that older persisted data
continues to load.

schema.title: CreateFeedbackRequest
schema.description: Request body for creating feedback on a task run.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.
project_id.title: Project Id

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task within the project.
task_id.title: Task Id

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the task run.
run_id.title: Run Id
